title: Hynfra Signs Framework Agreement With the Government of Mauritania for a USD 1.5 Billion Green Ammonia Project in Nouakchott
content: At the Mauritanides 2025 conference in Nouakchott, Hynfra signed a Framework Agreement with the Government of Mauritania, confirming the next stage in the development of a large-scale green ammonia project. The investment foresees the construction of an integrated facility that will produce 100,000 tons of green ammonia annually starting in 2030. The agreement was signed on behalf of the Government of Mauritania by H.E. Mohamed Ould Khaled, Minister of Energy and Petroleum, and on behalf of Mauritania Green Ammonia SARL by Tomoho Umeda, General Director of MGA and President of Hynfra P.S.A.
author: Analysts Account
